purpose: Bind Paper 119 external task families to concrete ManiSkill/SAPIEN environment candidates before high-fidelity collection. These bindings are registry/provenance checks only; they are not rollout evidence.

bindings.rationale: PegInsertionSide exposes contact-rich peg insertion geometry and resettable peg pose for the proposed skill-seam handoff.
OpenCabinetDrawer supplies the articulated drawer/contact mode; a pick environment is listed as the downstream grasp proxy that the backend must bind under shared reset provenance.
OpenCabinetDoor supplies hinge/contact dynamics for the first skill; the backend must document the downstream transition/navigability proxy before evidence can count.

ManiSkill does not expose a literal cable-routing task in the installed registry; PullCubeTool/InsertFlower are explicit contact-rich surrogates that require operator acceptance or replacement by a real cable environment.
